# PERF-75 negative: session options hoisted to package scope
lang: go
file: PERF-075-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/labstack/echo/v4"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

var sessionOpts = &gorm.Session{SkipDefaultTransaction: true}

func ListUsers(c echo.Context, db *gorm.DB) error {
	var users []User
	db.Session(sessionOpts).Select("id").Find(&users)
	return c.String(200, "ok")
}

type User struct {
	gorm.Model
}
